-class WeightedMAE(nn.Module):

-    def __init__(self):

-        super().__init__()

-

-    def forward(self, pred, target):

-        w = self.weights.to(pred.device).view(1, 12, 1)

-        loss = torch.abs(pred - target) * w

-        return loss.mean()
